messages.content:
[Model: anthropic/claude-opus-4.6]

[Provider: OpenRouter]

Build a production-quality Laravel app called "FishHunt" - a fishing activity planner. Tech: Laravel, PHP 8.3, PostgreSQL, Blade + Alpine.js, Tailwind CSS, Laravel Breeze auth. Features: 1) Auth with roles (Admin/Mod/Member) using roles+permissions tables, 2) Photo upload catch posts with feed, likes, comments, reports, 3) Hunt checklist planner that generates briefings with weather/tides/species data (use demo mode with realistic sample data). Include: migrations, models, controllers, policies, middleware, seeders with demo data, Blade templates. Make it mobile-first and impressive.

Include: migrations, models, controllers, policies, middleware, seeders with demo data, Blade templates. Make it mobile-first and impressive.
